final:
module parity_generator (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [2:0] data,
    output reg parity);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        parity <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        parity <= data[0] ^ data[1] ^ data[2];
    end
end
endmodule
